sentences.target: 毎晩、犬と散歩しています。
sentences.reading: まいばん、いぬとさんぽしています。

translations.en: I walk my dog every night.
translations.es: Saco a pasear a mi perro todas las noches.
translations.fr: Je promène mon chien tous les soirs.
translations.de: Ich gehe jeden Abend mit meinem Hund spazieren.
translations.it: Porto a spasso il mio cane ogni sera.
translations.pt: Eu passeio com meu cachorro todas as noites.
translations.he: אני מטייל עם הכלב שלי כל לילה.
translations.vi: Tôi dắt chó đi dạo mỗi đêm.
translations.nl: Ik wandel elke avond met mijn hond.
translations.hi: मैं हर रात अपने कुत्ते को टहलाता हूं।
translations.pl: Codziennie wieczorem wyprowadzam psa na spacer.
translations.el: Βγάζω βόλτα τον σκύλο μου κάθε βράδυ.
translations.nb: Jeg går tur med hunden min hver kveld.
translations.id: Saya berjalan-jalan dengan anjing saya setiap malam.
translations.sv: Jag går ut med min hund varje kväll.
translations.ro: Îmi plimb câinele în fiecare seară.
translations.da: Jeg går tur med min hund hver aften.

tokens.explanation: Indicates that the action occurs every night.
The animal that is being walked.
Marks the companion in the action.
The noun form of the action 'to walk'.
Continuative form of the verb『する』to verbalize『散歩』.
Conjunctive particle linking to the auxiliary verb for progressive aspect.
Combination of『し』and『ています』indicating the progressive/habitual action.

sentences.target: 私は毎晩日本語を勉強します。
sentences.reading: わたくしはまいばんにほんごをべんきょうします。

translations.fr: J’étudie le japonais tous les soirs.
translations.ko: 저는 매일 밤 일본어 공부를 합니다.
translations.pt: Eu estudo japonês todas as noites.
translations.vi: Tôi học tiếng Nhật mỗi tối.
translations.hi: मैं हर रात जापानी पढ़ता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya belajar bahasa Jepang setiap malam.

tokens.explanation: The speaker referring to themselves.
Marks『私』as the topic of the sentence.
Indicates that studying happens every night.
The object being studied.
Marks『日本語』as the direct object.
The noun form of the action 'to study'.
Polite present form of『する』, indicating the act of studying.

sentences.target: 毎晩星を見て、願い事をします。
sentences.reading: まいばんほしをみて、ねがいごとをします。

translations.en: I look at the stars every night and make a wish.
translations.es: Miro las estrellas cada noche y pido un deseo.
translations.fr: Je regarde les étoiles chaque nuit et je fais un vœu.
translations.de: Ich schaue jede Nacht die Sterne an und wünsche mir etwas.
translations.it: Guardo le stelle ogni notte e esprimo un desiderio.
translations.ko: 매일 밤 별을 보고 소원을 빌어요.
translations.yue: 我每晚望住星星，許下願望。
translations.ru: Я смотрю на звёзды каждую ночь и загадываю желание.
translations.pt: Eu olho para as estrelas toda noite e faço um pedido.
translations.he: אני מסתכלת על הכוכבים כל לילה ומבקשת משאלה.
translations.tr: Her gece yıldızlara bakıyorum ve dilek diliyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi ngắm sao mỗi đêm và thực hiện một điều ước.
translations.ar: أنظر إلى النجوم كل ليلة وأتمنى أمنية.
translations.nl: Ik kijk elke nacht naar de sterren en doe een wens.
translations.uk: Щоночі дивлюся на зірки і загадую бажання.
translations.hu: Minden este a csillagokat nézem, és kívánok valamit.
translations.hi: मैं हर रात सितारों को देखता हूं और एक इच्छा करता हूं।
translations.pl: Patrzę на gwiazdy każdej nocy i wypowiadam życzenie.
translations.el: Κοιτάζω τα αστέρια κάθε βράδυ και κάνω μια ευχή.
translations.nb: Jeg ser på stjernene hver natt og ønsker meg noe.
translations.id: Saya melihat bintang-bintang setiap malam dan membuat permintaan.
translations.sv: Jag tittar på stjärnorna varje natt och önskar mig något.
translations.ro: Privesc stelele în fiecare noapte și îmi pun o dorință.
translations.cs: Každou noc se dívám na hvězdy a přeji si něco.
translations.da: Jeg kigger på stjernerne hver nat og ønsker mig noget.
translations.fi: Katson tähtiä joka ilta ja toivon jotain.

tokens.explanation: Indicates when the actions occur.
The object that is being looked at.
Marks『星』as the direct object of見る.
Te-form of『見る』, linking to the next action.
The thing that the speaker makes a wish about.
Marks『願い事』as the object ofする.
Polite present form of『する』, indicating making a wish.

sentences.target: 母は毎晩台所で料理しています。
sentences.reading: はははまいばんだいどころでりょうりしています。

translations.en: My mother cooks in the kitchen every night.
translations.es: Mi madre cocina en la cocina todas las noches.
translations.fr: Ma mère cuisine dans la cuisine tous les soirs.
translations.de: Meine Mutter kocht jeden Abend in der Küche.
translations.it: Mia madre cucina in cucina ogni sera.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妈妈每天晚上都在厨房做饭。
translations.yue: 我媽咪每晚都喺廚房煮飯。
translations.ru: Моя мама готовит на кухне каждый вечер.
translations.pt: Minha mãe cozinha na cozinha todas as noites.
translations.he: אמא שלי מבשלת במטבח כל לילה.
translations.tr: Annem her gece mutfakta yemek yapıyor.
translations.vi: Mẹ tôi nấu ăn trong bếp mỗi tối.
translations.ar: أمي تطبخ في المطبخ كل ليلة.
translations.nl: Mijn moeder kookt elke avond in de keuken.
translations.uk: Моя мама щовечора готує на кухні.
translations.hu: Anyám minden este a konyhában főz.
translations.hi: मेरी मां हर रात रसोई में खाना बनाती है।
translations.pl: Moja mama gotuje w kuchni co wieczór.
translations.el: Η μητέρα μου μαγειρεύει στην κουζίνα κάθε βράδυ.
translations.nb: Moren min lager mat på kjøkkenet hver kveld.
translations.id: Ibu saya memasak di dapur setiap malam.
translations.sv: Min mamma lagar mat i köket varje kväll.
translations.ro: Mama mea gătește în bucătărie în fiecare seară.
translations.cs: Moje matka vaří v kuchyni každý večer.
translations.da: Min mor laver mad i køkkenet hver aften.

tokens.explanation: Refers to the speaker's mother.
Marks『母』as the topic of the sentence.
Indicates frequency of the action.
The location where the cooking takes place.
Marks the location of the action.
The noun form of the action 'to cook'.
Continuative form of『する』attached to『料理』.
Conjunctive particle linking to the auxiliary verb.
Indicates the ongoing action of cooking.

Mi madre cocina en la cocina todas las noches.

Je regarde les étoiles chaque nuit et je fais un vœu.
Ma mère cuisine dans la cuisine tous les soirs.

Ich schaue jede Nacht die Sterne an und wünsche mir etwas.

मेरी मां हर रात रसोई में खाना बनाती है।

Moren min lager mat på kjøkkenet hver kveld.

Privesc stelele în fiecare noapte și îmi pun o dorință.
Mama mea gătește în bucătărie în fiecare seară.
